metadata.description: First-party Claude-format plugins published as individually installable commands, skills, and hooks.

plugins.name: commit-msg
plugins.description: Generate a commit message for staged changes.

plugins.name: commit-split
plugins.description: Suggest how to split staged changes into multiple logical commits.

plugins.name: next-best-thing
plugins.description: Recommend the single highest-leverage next addition to the current repository.

plugins.name: simplify
plugins.description: Apply safe, behavior-preserving cleanup edits to existing code.

plugins.name: block-package-managers
plugins.description: Block npm and npx terminal commands and redirect usage toward pnpm.

plugins.name: lint-and-format
plugins.description: Run pnpm format and pnpm lint after code-changing tools when package scripts exist.
